message:
fix(cargo-path-deps): accept filesystem-resolved symlink targets in dependency scope validation

The absolute dependency scope check only matched the two stored roots
(canonical and alias) from PathTopologyPolicy. On systems where those
roots resolve further through symlinks (e.g., macOS /tmp -> /private/tmp),
dependency paths using the resolved form were falsely rejected as policy
violations. Add allowed_dependency_roots() helper that canonicalizes both
roots via std::fs::canonicalize and accepts the resolved paths as
additional allowed roots. Refactor validate_absolute_dependency_scope to
iterate over all allowed roots instead of hardcoding two checks. Add
unix-only test for resolved alias target acceptance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
